#  Processors 
Power laptops, desktops, workstations, and servers with Intel® processors built on decades of innovation. Get the performance you need for business, gaming, AI, creation, and more.
* * *
## [ Intel® Core™ Ultra processors  Processors for premium laptops balancing speed, battery life, and built-in AI acceleration.1 ![Intel Core Ultra logo on a square background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-core-ultra-badge:680-680?ts=1776800134043&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/core-ultra.html)
## [ Intel® Core™ processors  High-speed processors for desktops and laptops across mainstream computing needs. ![Intel Core logo on a square background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-core-badge:680-680?ts=1776721534937&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/core.html)
## [ Intel® Xeon® processors  Processors built for general enterprise servers and workstations. ![Intel Xeon logo on a square background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-xeon-badge:680-680?ts=1776800135241&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/all.html)
## [ Intel® Xeon® CPU Max processors  Advanced Xeon processors with high-bandwidth memory for AI and supercomputing. ![Intel Xeon Max series logo on a square background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-xeon-max-series-badge:680-680?ts=1776800131287&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/xeon/max-series.html)
## [ Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors  Processors for handheld gaming, delivering smooth, responsive play with performance that lasts wherever you play. ![Square product badge for Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/arc-g-series-unleveled:680-680?ts=1779495783711&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/arc/g-series/handheld-gaming.html)
## [ Intel Atom® processors  Low-power chips for edge devices, automation, and compact smart systems. ![Intel Atom logo on a square background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-atom-badge:680-680?ts=1776800130767&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/atom.html)
## [ Intel® processors  Intel’s entry level processors for performance and affordability you need in order to connect, learn, and play anywhere. ![Intel processor logo on a square background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-processor-badge:680-680?ts=1776800070587&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/intel-processor.html)
* * *
##  Find the right PC for you 
Choosing a PC doesn’t have to be complicated. Whether it’s for work, creating, or gaming, we’ve got you covered.
[ Find your PC ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/systems-devices/find-the-right-pc.html)
![Open laptop with the Intel logo on the screen](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-laptop-hero-logo:360-360?ts=1777486067082&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
* * *
## [ Intel® Evo™ laptops  Exceptional performance, long battery life2, and built-in AI capabilities enhance productivity, security, and connectivity. Explore Intel® Evo™ laptops  ![Open laptop with the Intel Core Ultra logo and Intel evo edition mark](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-evo-laptops:680-680?ts=1776449201561&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/systems-devices/laptops/evo.html)
## [ Desktops  Get the performance you need to be more productive, connected, and entertained, whether multitasking at work, creating videos, gaming, or streaming. Explore desktops  ![Desktop computer tower with a transparent side panel and internal components visible](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-desktops:680-680?ts=1776449200685&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/systems-devices/desktops.html)
## [ Laptops  Work, play, or create content wherever you go with devices that deliver outstanding performance and convenient portability. Explore laptops  ![Open laptop with Intel logo on the screen](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-laptop-hero-logo:680-680?ts=1776449202651&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/systems-devices/laptops.html)
## [ Workstations  Get the power to do more with a system purpose-built to handle compute-intensive tasks and specific applications such as AI development, architecture, research, engineering, financial services, and more. Explore workstations  ![Desktop computer setup with tower, monitor, keyboard, and mouse](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-workstations:680-680?ts=1776449199834&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1) ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/systems-devices/workstations.html)
* * *
### **Product and Performance Information**
1 AI features may require additional purchase or specific compatibility requirements. See [intel.com/performanceindex](https://edc.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/performance/benchmarks/overview/) for details. Results may vary. (As of August 2024.)
  
2 Based on verified real-world battery life of Intel® Evo™ designs while performing typical workflows in a realistic environment within average daily usage scenarios. Individual system results may vary. See [intel.com/Performance-Evo](https://edc.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/performance/benchmarks/intel-evo/) for details.

See Intel’s [Global Human Rights Principles](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/policy/policy-human-rights.html). Intel’s products and software are intended only to be used in applications that do not cause or contribute to adverse impacts on human rights.

    Processors

    Power laptops, desktops, workstations, and servers with Intel® processors built on decades of innovation. Get the performance you need for business, gaming, AI, creation, and more.

    Intel® Core™ Ultra processors

    Processors for premium laptops balancing speed, battery life, and built-in AI acceleration.1

    Intel® Core™ processors

    High-speed processors for desktops and laptops across mainstream computing needs.

    Intel® Xeon® processors

    Processors built for general enterprise servers and workstations.

    Intel® Xeon® CPU Max processors

    Advanced Xeon processors with high-bandwidth memory for AI and supercomputing.

    Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors

    Processors for handheld gaming, delivering smooth, responsive play with performance that lasts wherever you play.

    Intel Atom® processors

    Low-power chips for edge devices, automation, and compact smart systems.

    Intel® processors

    Intel’s entry level processors for performance and affordability you need in order to connect, learn, and play anywhere.

    Find the right PC for you

    Choosing a PC doesn’t have to be complicated. Whether it’s for work, creating, or gaming, we’ve got you covered.

    Find your PC

    Intel® Evo™ laptops

    Exceptional performance, long battery life2, and built-in AI capabilities enhance productivity, security, and connectivity.

    Explore Intel® Evo™ laptops

    Desktops

    Get the performance you need to be more productive, connected, and entertained, whether multitasking at work, creating videos, gaming, or streaming.

    Explore desktops

    Laptops

    Work, play, or create content wherever you go with devices that deliver outstanding performance and convenient portability.

    Explore laptops

    Workstations

    Get the power to do more with a system purpose-built to handle compute-intensive tasks and specific applications such as AI development, architecture, research, engineering, financial services, and more.

    Explore workstations

    Product and Performance Information

    1 AI features may require additional purchase or specific compatibility requirements. See intel.com/performanceindex for details. Results may vary. (As of August 2024.)


    2 Based on verified real-world battery life of Intel® Evo™ designs while performing typical workflows in a realistic environment within average daily usage scenarios. Individual system results may vary. See intel.com/Performance-Evo for details.
